# ysuverticaldispersion Process CMakeLists.txt
# Generated by CATChem Process Generator

# Add ysuverticaldispersion process module
add_library(ysuverticaldispersion_process ysuverticaldispersionProcess_Mod.F90)

# Link dependencies
target_link_libraries(
  ysuverticaldispersion_process
  precision_mod
  state_mod
  error_mod
  process_interface_mod
)

# Include directories
target_include_directories(
  ysuverticaldispersion_process
  PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

# Install targets
install(TARGETS ysuverticaldispersion_process DESTINATION lib)

# Install module files
install(
  FILES ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ysuverticaldispersionprocess_mod.mod
  DESTINATION include
)
